MODULE: cosmos.mcp_server.agent_tools
FILE: cosmos/mcp_server/agent_tools.py (302 lines)
CATEGORY: mcp_server

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Agent Tools - MCP Tool Implementations for Agent Operations

Provides agent swarm capabilities:
- Task delegation to specialists
- Agent status monitoring
- Multi-agent task coordination

CLASSES:
- AgentToolResult: Result from an agent tool operation.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- AgentTools: Agent tool implementations for the MCP server.

Provides access to the agent swa
  Methods: async def delegate_task(self, task: str, agent_type: str='auto', context: Optional[dict]=None, prior
  Methods: async def execute_multi_task(self, main_task: str, subtasks: list[str], context: Optional[dict]=None
  Methods: async def get_agent_status(self, agent_id: Optional[str]=None) -> AgentToolResult
  Methods: async def get_task_status(self, task_id: str) -> AgentToolResult
  Methods: async def list_available_agents(self) -> AgentToolResult
